title: Build document upload pipeline with PDF/DOCX parsing
description: Implement drag-and-drop file upload for PDF and DOCX files. Server-side parsing extracts raw text. Files are stored and associated with the matter. Upload status is tracked (uploading, processing, ready, failed).

acceptance_criteria.text: Drag-and-drop upload UI accepts PDF and DOCX files up to 50 MB
MIME type validated server-side (reject non PDF/DOCX)
pdf-parse extracts text from text-native PDFs
mammoth extracts text from DOCX files
Document record created in Postgres with status tracking (uploading → processing → ready | failed)
Documents tab on matter detail lists all uploaded documents with status badges

steps: Store file to /tmp (v1) and save Document record
Update document status through processing lifecycle
Build DocumentList component for the Documents tab
risks: Scanned PDFs without OCR will produce empty text — document this limitation clearly in UI
/tmp storage is ephemeral on Replit — flag for persistent storage upgrade in v1.1
